name: Transfers - Cancel a Transfer
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find"}, {"text": " "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/443-transfers-cancel-a-transfer#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "FAQs and related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There may be occasions where you need to cancel a Transfer to prevent the goods from being dispatched between multiple Outlets/Warehouses."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Transfer can only be deleted if it has not yet been Dispatched."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cancelling a Transfer will remove items from the Requested inventory status, and increase the Available stock. Transfers cannot be deleted, only cancelled. Use the "}, {"text": "Transfer Report"}, {"text": " to view Cancelled Transfers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To cancel a Transfer:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Inventory > Transfer Management > Transfer Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " to locate the required Transfer"}, {"text": "\n\n"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Enter the Transfer Number to quickly find the required Transfer"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiNkEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiNkEAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip3 (67).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Transfer Number ", "bold": true}, {"text": "or the "}, {"text": "Pencil ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon to open the Transfer"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Cancel Transfer", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphf6EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphf6EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-10T031209.221.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "OK ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to the update inventory message"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiO4EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiO4EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 - 2023-07-10T031214.016.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Transfer will be cancelled"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Frequently Asked Questions"}], "data-id": "frequently-asked-questions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/443-transfers-cancel-a-transfer#cancel-sale", "children": [{"text": "Will cancelling a sale cancel the Transfer associated with the sale?"}]}], "data-id": "will-cancelling-a-sale-cancel-the-transfer-associated-with-the-sale"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Transfers can be "}, {"text": "created in POS"}, {"text": " by changing the Source and Fulfilment Outlets on a sale."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If the Transfer has been "}, {"text": "dispatched", "bold": true}, {"text": " voiding the sale in POS "}, {"text": "will not ", "italic": true}, {"text": "cancel the Transfer"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If the Transfer is "}, {"text": "not dispatched", "bold": true}, {"text": " voiding a sale "}, {"text": "will", "italic": true}, {"text": " automatically cancel the Transfer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By setting the Transfer to Dispatched it indicates the stock has already left for the new Outlet. The Transfer will need to be received and then a new Transfer entered to return the stock to the original Outlet."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inventory - Create a manual Transfer in Back Office"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inventory - Create a Transfer using an Excel Upload"}]}]}]}]
